slides.title: Boxes of Data 📦
slides.content:
A variable is like a storage box. You put data inside it and stick a label on the box.

Use the `var` keyword to create a new box!

slides.title: Creating a Variable
slides.content: Let's store a name in a variable called `playerName`.

quizData.question: What keyword helps you quickly create a variable without declaring its specific type?
quizData.explanation: The `var` keyword creates a variable automatically!

slides.title: Changing the Box
slides.content: You can update the value in a `var` variable as long as it's the same type of data.
